title: rubus thyrsoideus f. subglandulosus
intro: Rubus thyrsoideus f. subglandulosus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a variant of the Himalayan raspberry plant, belonging to the Rubus genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus thyrsoideus f. subglandulosus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Rubus thyrsoideus f. subglandulosus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often used to create herbal remedies for various health conditions.
